# Injection pattern regexes (one per line, Python re syntax, case-insensitive applied at call site)
# Direct instruction override
ignore\s+(all\s+)?(previous|the\s+above)\s+instructions?
ignore\s+all\s+(previous\s+)?instructions?
disregard\s+(the\s+)?(above|previous|prior|prior\s+instructions?)
forget\s+(everything|all)\s+(above|before|you\s+were\s+told)

# Role-switch injections
you\s+are\s+now\s+(a\s+)?(different|another|unrestricted|an?\s+[a-z]+\s+)?(ai|model)
you\s+are\s+(no\s+longer|not)\s+tldr

# Role tokens (chat-template markers used in many open-weight models)
<\|im_start\|>
<\|im_end\|>
<\|assistant\|>
<\|system\|>
<system>
</system>
<\|user\|>
\[INST\]
\[/INST\]
<<SYS>>
<</SYS>>

# Base-prompt leak attempts
print\s+(your\s+)?(system\s+prompt|instructions|prompt)
(reveal|output|show|repeat|print)\s+(your\s+)?(initial\s+)?prompt
what\s+(are\s+your|is\s+your)\s+(instructions?|system\s+prompt)

# Override phrasings
new\s+instruction[s]?:
updated?\s+instruction[s]?:
override\s+instruction[s]?:
developer\s+mode
jailbreak

# Embedded newline / separator tricks attempting context boundary crossing
---\s*system\s*---
===\s*system\s*===
\[system\]
